x-mios.schema_kind: Registry of host-side function-calling tools shipped with MiOS, in both OpenAI tool shapes (chat-completions function format and Responses flat-tool format). Each entry points at the on-disk JSON definition; the dispatcher binary at /usr/libexec/mios/tools/<name> implements the tool.
x-mios.intent: MiOS agents read this manifest to populate the `tools` array on chat/completions or responses requests without hardcoding tool names. Adding a new tool means dropping {chat-completions-api,responses-api}/<name>.json + /usr/libexec/mios/tools/<name> and appending an entry here.

data.name: bootc_status
data.description: Inspect current bootc state (image ref, deployment, staged update, rollback target).

data.name: bootc_switch
data.description: Switch to a different image reference. Stages a new deployment; reboot to activate.

data.name: mios_build
data.description: Run the OCI build (delegates to mios-pipeline.{ps1,sh} Phase 8). Produces localhost/mios:latest.

data.name: mios_build_kb_refresh
data.description: Regenerate the local Knowledge Base index. Reads /usr/share/mios/kb/manifest.json and rebuilds the embedding store.

data.name: mios_kargs_validate
data.description: Lint usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/*.toml against the bootc schema (flat kargs = [...] only; no [kargs] header).

data.name: packages_md_query
data.description: Query the package single-source-of-truth (usr/share/mios/PACKAGES.md). Returns the resolved package list for a given category.

data.name: repo_overlay_inspect
data.description: Diff /usr against the in-repo overlay tree. Reports drift between the deployed root and the canonical source-of-truth in mios.git.

data.name: file_search
data.description: OpenAI Responses-API-shaped file_search tool. Backed by the local vector store (Qdrant by default; configurable via etc/mios/kb.conf.toml).

data.name: mcp
data.description: OpenAI Responses-API-shaped MCP tool. Resolves to the server registry at /usr/share/mios/ai/v1/mcp.json.
